message:
fix: resolve lint errors blocking all CI (gosec G304, unused param)

Two lint issues introduced in 13a8daa3 caused systemic CI failure across
all 20 open PRs. Fix gosec G304 false positive in verifySQLiteFile and
remove unused beadsDir parameter from handleFreshCloneError.
